title: Hotel Check-in 酒店入住
scene: 一家人到酒店前台办理入住。

lines.en: Hello, I have a reservation under the name Wang. Two rooms for three nights.
lines.zh: 你好，我预订了房间，姓王。两间房，住三晚。

lines.en: Let me check... Yes, I can see your reservation. May I have your ID?
lines.zh: 让我查一下……是的，我看到了您的预订。请出示您的身份证。

lines.en: Here is my ID. Are the rooms on the same floor?
lines.zh: 这是我的身份证。两个房间在同一层吗？

lines.en: Yes, both rooms are on the fifth floor, next to each other.
lines.zh: 是的，两个房间都在五楼，紧挨着。

lines.en: That's perfect. Does the hotel have breakfast included?
lines.zh: 太好了。酒店包含早餐吗？

lines.en: Yes, breakfast is served from seven to nine on the second floor.
lines.zh: 是的，早餐在二楼，七点到九点供应。
太好了！退房时间是几点？

lines.en: Check-out is at noon. Here are your room keys. Enjoy your stay!
lines.zh: 退房时间是中午。这是您的房卡。祝您入住愉快！

lines.en: Thank you! Is there free Wi-Fi in the rooms?
Yes, the password is on the back of the room card. Enjoy!
lines.zh: 有的，密码在房卡背面。祝您愉快！
